examples: The biological anthropologist Christy Turner is an expert in the analysis of changing physical characteristics in human teeth.
Artist Christy Rupp is not afraid of death.
Thank you, Christy. I'll get it eventually.
Not long ago, a woman named Christy Ferer traveled to Iraq along with the USO.
One time Republican Governor Christy Todd Whitman is aghast at what has gone on in Florida.
